info.english_meaning: to love to satisfy to desire to wish to be radiant
info.hindI_arTa: prItI karanA tfpta karanA kAmanA karanA kAMtimAna honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: prIN prItO prIyateprIRAt prIRIte tarpaRe YitaH  aRO yO Yittva - sAPalyAt prIRayet prayate prayet ' (Slo. 19 - 20) - devaH
